channel.title: Fikes Vehicles
channel.description: Fikes Chevrolet live vehicle inventory feed for Facebook/Instagram Commerce Manager

item.g:title: Pre-Owned 2007 Saab 9-3 2.0T FWD Sedan
item.g:description: 170,255 miles, Black exterior, Cream interior, Automatic, 2.0L L4 DOHC 16V TURBO

item.g:title: Pre-Owned 2018 Hyundai Sonata SE FWD Sedan
item.g:description: 115,410 miles, Black exterior, Tan interior, Automatic, 2.4L L4 DOHC 16V

item.g:title: Pre-Owned 2022 Chevrolet Equinox RS Front Wheel Drive SUV
item.g:description: 73,556 miles, Summit White exterior, Jet Black, Perforated leather-appointed seat trim interior, Automatic, 1.5L Turbo 4-cylinder engine
item.g:interior_color: Jet Black, Perforated leather-appointed seat trim

item.g:title: Pre-Owned 2019 Cadillac XT4 FWD Premium Luxury Front Wheel Drive SUV
item.g:description: 80,852 miles, RADIANT SILVER METALLIC exterior, With Linear Galaxy high-gloss genuine wood trim.) interior, Automatic, Engine 2.0L 4 Cyl, Turbo
item.g:interior_color: With Linear Galaxy high-gloss genuine wood trim.)

item.g:description: 72,306 miles, Sterling Gray Metallic exterior, Medium Ash Gray, Premium Cloth seat trim interior, Automatic, 1.5L Turbo 4-cylinder engine
item.g:interior_color: Medium Ash Gray, Premium Cloth seat trim
